hypotheses.name: Cross-seed replication: TF vs target-only AUROC (SV5-7, L0)
hypotheses.method: At L0, SVD of centered nonzero embeddings. Project to SV5-7. 5-fold stratified LR, 100-perm null. Applied to main (n_nz=2039), seed43 (n_nz=2080), seed44 (n_nz=1972). TF genes: n≈70; target-only: n≈215.
hypotheses.next_action: Combine SV2-7 (6D) for joint classifier to test if combined subspaces give higher and layer-stable AUROC.

hypotheses.name: Layer-resolved AUROC: SV5-7 vs SV2-4 across all 12 layers
hypotheses.method: At each of 12 layers: SVD of centered nonzero embeddings [2039,512], project to SV5-7 and SV2-4 separately. 5-fold stratified LR AUROC for TF vs target-only. SV2-4 used as same-subspace control. Main seed only.
hypotheses.result_value: SV5-7 peaks at L3=0.728; drops to L8=0.543; recovers at L9-L11 (~0.67-0.68). SV2-4 peaks at L5=0.740; drops at L9-L11 (~0.65). Complementary encoding: SV5-7 high early+late, SV2-4 high mid-depth.
hypotheses.next_action: Joint SV2-7 classifier at all 12 layers. GO enrichment of top-displacement genes at L9 crossover.

hypotheses.name: Directionality trajectory SV2-4 vs SV5-7 (opposite dynamics control)
hypotheses.method: At each of 12 layers: compute mean displacement vector (target - source) for 589 TRRUST positive pairs in SV2-4 and SV5-7 subspaces. Report displacement magnitude and Cohen's d. SV2-4 as control for SV5-7.
hypotheses.primary_metric: Displacement magnitude per layer (SV2-4 vs SV5-7)
hypotheses.result_value: SV2-4: monotone decrease L0=2.035 -> L11=0.635. SV5-7: increase L0=0.416 -> L9=1.295, then decrease to L11=0.613. Crossover at L9 (SV5-7 > SV2-4). All layers p<0.001.
hypotheses.next_action: Replicate directionality trajectory on seed43/seed44. Add label-shuffle null for magnitude. GO enrichment of L9 top-moving genes.
